zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Blount於1414年出生在英國林可爾史爾吉爾斯比時，他的父親Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston37歲，母親Margaret De Gresley21歲。他於1453年與Lady Agnes Hawley結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1468年在英國萊希斯特斯爾享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Blount于1414年出生在英国林可爾史爾吉爾斯比时，他的父亲Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston37岁，母亲Margaret De Gresley21岁。他于1453年与Lady Agnes Hawley结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1468年在英国萊希斯特斯爾享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Blount was born in 1414, in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston, was 37 and his mother, Margaret De Gresley, was 21. He married Lady Agnes Hawley in 1453. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1468, in Leicestershire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Blount est né en 1414, à Girsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Gresley, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Hawley en 1453. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1468, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Blount 1414 in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston 37 und seine Mutter Margaret De Gresley 21. Er hat 1453 Lady Agnes Hawley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1468 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Leicestershire, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Blount è nato il nel 1414 nel Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Margaret De Gresley, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lady Agnes Hawley nel 1453. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1468, nel Leicestershire, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Blountが1414年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアギルスビーで生まれた時，父Thomas Blount Baronet Elvastonは37歳，母Margaret De Gresleyは21歳であった。1453年にLady Agnes Hawleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1468年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Blount(이)가 1414년 영국 링코실르 지르스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret De Gresley(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1453년 Lady Agnes Hawley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1468년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Blount nasceu em 1414, em Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Gresley, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Hawley em 1453. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1468, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Blount родился в 1414 г. в местности гирсби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Gresley, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Hawley в 1453 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1468 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Blount nació en 1414, en Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Blount Baronet Elvaston, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Margaret De Gresley, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lady Agnes Hawley en 1453. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1468, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
